mapper.select: SELECT EVENTNO AS eventno, EVENT_GB as eventGb, TITLE AS title, TO_CHAR(START_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS startTime, TO_CHAR(END_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS endTime FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT ALARMNO AS alarmno, SYSNAME AS sysname , EQUIPTYPE AS equiptype, ALARMTIME AS alarmtime, RECEIVETIME AS receivetime, ALARMLOC AS alarmloc , ALARMMSG AS alarmmsg, UNIT AS unit , CASE WHEN ALARMLEVEL = '1' THEN 'CL' WHEN ALARMLEVEL = '3' THEN 'WN' WHEN ALARMLEVEL = '4' THEN 'MN' WHEN ALARMLEVEL = '5' THEN 'MJ' WHEN ALARMLEVEL = '7' THEN 'CR' END AS alarmlevel FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_ALARM_CUR_MST WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT SYSNAME AS sysname, PORT AS port, UNIT AS unit, TMPER AS tmper , RXCUR AS rxCur, RXMIN AS rxMin, RXMAX AS rxMax, RXAVE AS rxAve , TXCUR AS txCur, TXMIN AS txMin, TXMAX AS txMax, TXAVE AS txAve, OCRTIME AS ocrtime FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT LINK_ID AS linkId, SYSNAMEA AS sysnamea, PTPNAMEA_BAU AS ptpnameaBau, PTPNAMEA_PAU AS ptpnameaPau , SYSNAMEZ AS sysnamez, PTPNAMEZ_BAU AS ptpnamezBau, PTPNAMEZ_PAU AS ptpnamezPau FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_NNI_TOPOLOGY WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT EVENTNO AS eventno, (SELECT TITLE FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}) AS title, LINK_ID AS linkId, SYSNAMEA AS sysnamea, SHELFA AS shelfa , PTPNAMEA AS ptpnamea , SYSNAMEZ AS sysnamez, SHELFZ AS shelfz, PTPNAMEZ AS ptpnamez FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_UNI_TOPOLOGY WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT INTERRIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRTYPE , STRLEVEL, STRTITLE, STRCONTENT, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1 , STRGROUPID2, STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6 , STRGROUPID7, STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, DATERAISEDATE , DATECLEARDATE, DATEREGDATE, STRCLEARCHECK, STRMEMO, STRACKNOWNCHECK , STRACKNOWNCHECK_MEMBER_SRL FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_XE_CVNMS_ERROR WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT STRRESNAME, STRIPADDR, STRIFNAME, STRIFDESC, STRIFSPEED , STRIFTYPE, STRIFOPERSTATUS, NREN_ID, NREN_NAME, NODE_ID , IF_ID, STRIFID, STRRESID, STRTYPEMIN, INTTIMESTAMP , INTYEAR, INTMONTH, INTDAY, INTHOUR, INTMIN , INTWEEK, INTBANDWIDTH, FLTBPSIN, FLTBPSOUT, FLTPPSIN , FLTPPSOUT, FLTERRORIN, FLTERROROUT, FLTDISCARDIN, FLTDISCARDOUT , FLTUNKNOWN, FLTUSAGE, FLHCINOCTETS, FLHCOUTOCTETS, FLHCINUCASTPKTS , FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS, FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS , FLTBPSINMAX, FLTBPSOUTMAX, FLTPPSINMAX, FLTPPSOUTMAX, FLTERRORINMAX , FLTERROROUTMAX, FLTDISCARDINMAX, FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, FLTUNKNOWNMAX, FLTUSAGEMAX, AI_ACCURACY FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT STRRESIP, STRRESNAME, STRS_IP, STRS_PORT, STRD_IP, STRD_PORT, STRS_MAC, STRD_MAC, STRPROTOCOL, STRIPV4TOS, STRCHANNEL, STRSENDERIP, STRIN_INTERFACE, STROUT_INTERFACE, STRBYTES_COL, STRCOUNTS, DATEREGDATE, AI_ACCURACY FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_XE_SFLOW_LOG WHERE EVENTNO = #{eventno}

SELECT INTRESIDX, MODULE_SRL, MEMBER_SRL, STRRESNAME, STRRESID , STRRESTYPE, STRMODELID, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1, STRGROUPID2 , STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6, STRGROUPID7 , STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, STRTAGS, STRPRIORITY , STRRESMEMO, STRCOLID, STRIPVER, STRIPADDR, STRIPV6ADDR , STRSNMPIPADDR, STRSNMPVER, STRSNMPCOMMUNITY, INTSNMPPORT, INTSNMPTIMEOUT , STRSNMPV3_USERNAME, STRSNMPV3_SECURITYLEVEL, STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPROTOCOL, STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPASSWORD, STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPROTOCOL , STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPASSWORD, STRSNMPV3_CONTEXTNAME, STRENABLED_CPU, STRENABLED_MEM, STRENABLED_DISK , STRSNMPMIB_CPU, STRSNMPMIB_MEM, STRSNMPMIB_DISK, STREVENT_CPU, STREVENT_MEM , STREVENT_DISK, STRSTATUSSNMP, STRENABLEDSNMP, DATEUPTIME, STRSTATUSPING , INTINTERVALPING, INTTIMEOUTPING, STRENABLEDPING, INTLOGRAISECOUNT, INTERRRAISECOUNT , STRCPUCURRENT, STRMEMCURRENT, STRDISKCURRENT, STRRTTCURRENT, INTSENSORPID , STRALIVE, STRCONTACTS, DATEPROBEUPDATEDATE, DATELASTUPDATEDATE, DATEREGDATE FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE

SELECT INTIFIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRIFNAME , STRRESID_A, STRRESID_Z, INTIFINDEX, STRIFDESC, STRIFTYPE , STRIFSPEED, STRIFPHYSADDRESS, STRIFOPERSTATUS, STRIFLIMITBPS, STRIFLIMITBPSC , STRIFLIMITBPSM, STRIFLIMITBPSN, STRIFLIMITBPSW, STRIFERRLEVEL, STRIFIPADDR , STRIFMANPERF, STRIFMANERROR, STRIFCURRENT, STRIFLIMITERR, STRIFMEMO , DATELASTUPDATEDATE, DATEREGDATE FROM RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT (EVENTNO, EVENT_GB, TITLE ,START_TIME, END_TIME) SELECT #{eventno}, #{eventGb}, #{title}, #{startTime}::TIMESTAMP, #{endTime}::TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_ALARM_CUR_MST (EVENTNO, ALARMNO, SYSNAME, EQUIPTYPE, ALARMTIME, RECEIVETIME, ALARMLOC, ALARMMSG, UNIT, ALARMLEVEL) SELECT DISTINCT #{eventno}, ALARMNO, SYSNAME, EQUIPTYPE, ALARMTIME, RECEIVETIME, ALARMLOC, ALARMMSG_ORIGINAL, UNIT, ALARMLEVEL FROM RCA.TB_ALARM_CUR_MST WHERE RECEIVETIME BETWEEN #{startTime}::TIMESTAMP AND #{endTime}::TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_PERFORMACE_MST (EVENTNO, SYSNAME, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE, TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME) SELECT DISTINCT #{eventno}, SYSNAME, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE, TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME FROM NIA.TB_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE OCRTIME BETWEEN #{startTime}::TIMESTAMP AND #{endTime}::TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_NNI_TOPOLOGY (EVENTNO, LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, PTPNAMEA_BAU, PTPNAMEA_PAU, SYSNAMEZ, PTPNAMEZ_BAU, PTPNAMEZ_PAU) SELECT DISTINCT #{eventno}, LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, PTPNAMEA_BAU, PTPNAMEA_PAU, SYSNAMEZ, PTPNAMEZ_BAU, PTPNAMEZ_PAU FROM NIA.TB_TOPOLOGY

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_UNI_TOPOLOGY (EVENTNO, LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, SHELFA, PTPNAMEA, SYSNAMEZ, SHELFZ, PTPNAMEZ) SELECT DISTINCT #{eventno}, LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, SHELFA, PTPNAMEA, SYSNAMEZ, SHELFZ, PTPNAMEZ FROM NIA.TB_UNI_TOPOLOGY

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_XE_CVNMS_ERROR ( EVENTNO, INTERRIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRTYPE, STRLEVEL, STRTITLE, STRCONTENT, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1, STRGROUPID2, STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6, STRGROUPID7, STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, DATERAISEDATE, DATECLEARDATE, DATEREGDATE, STRCLEARCHECK, STRMEMO, STRACKNOWNCHECK, STRACKNOWNCHECK_MEMBER_SRL ) SELECT #{eventno}, INTERRIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRTYPE , STRLEVEL, STRTITLE, STRCONTENT, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1 , STRGROUPID2, STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6 , STRGROUPID7, STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, DATERAISEDATE , DATECLEARDATE, DATEREGDATE, STRCLEARCHECK, STRMEMO, STRACKNOWNCHECK , STRACKNOWNCHECK_MEMBER_SRL FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_ERROR WHERE DATECLEARDATE BETWEEN #{startTime}::TIMESTAMP AND #{endTime}::TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF ( EVENTNO, STRRESNAME, STRIPADDR, STRIFNAME, STRIFDESC, STRIFSPEED, STRIFTYPE, STRIFOPERSTATUS, NREN_ID, NREN_NAME, NODE_ID, IF_ID, STRIFID, STRRESID, STRTYPEMIN, INTTIMESTAMP, INTYEAR, INTMONTH, INTDAY, INTHOUR, INTMIN, INTWEEK, INTBANDWIDTH, FLTBPSIN, FLTBPSOUT, FLTPPSIN, FLTPPSOUT, FLTERRORIN, FLTERROROUT, FLTDISCARDIN, FLTDISCARDOUT, FLTUNKNOWN, FLTUSAGE, FLHCINOCTETS, FLHCOUTOCTETS, FLHCINUCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS, FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, FLTBPSINMAX, FLTBPSOUTMAX, FLTPPSINMAX, FLTPPSOUTMAX, FLTERRORINMAX, FLTERROROUTMAX, FLTDISCARDINMAX, FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, FLTUNKNOWNMAX, FLTUSAGEMAX, AI_ACCURACY )
SELECT #{eventno}, R.STRRESNAME, R.STRIPADDR , I.STRIFNAME, I.STRIFDESC, I.STRIFSPEED, I.STRIFTYPE, I.STRIFOPERSTATUS , UO.NREN_ID, UO.NREN_NAME, UO.NODE_ID, UO.IF_ID , P.STRIFID, P.STRRESID, P.STRTYPEMIN, P.INTTIMESTAMP, P.INTYEAR , P.INTMONTH, P.INTDAY, P.INTHOUR, P.INTMIN, P.INTWEEK , P.INTBANDWIDTH, P.FLTBPSIN, P.FLTBPSOUT, P.FLTPPSIN, P.FLTPPSOUT , P.FLTERRORIN, P.FLTERROROUT, P.FLTDISCARDIN, P.FLTDISCARDOUT, P.FLTUNKNOWN , P.FLTUSAGE, P.FLHCINOCTETS, P.FLHCOUTOCTETS, P.FLHCINUCASTPKTS, P.FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , P.FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, P.FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, P.FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, P.FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, P.FLTBPSINMAX , P.FLTBPSOUTMAX, P.FLTPPSINMAX, P.FLTPPSOUTMAX, P.FLTERRORINMAX, P.FLTERROROUTMAX , P.FLTDISCARDINMAX, P.FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, P.FLTUNKNOWNMAX, P.FLTUSAGEMAX, AI.AI_ACCURACY FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF P LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE R ON P.STRRESID = R.STRRESID LEFT OUTER JOIN IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF I ON P.STRRESID = I.STRRESID AND P.STRIFID = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.NODE_NUM = I.STRRESID AND PM.IF_NUM = I.STRIFID LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON PM.NODE_ID=UO.NODE_ID AND PM.IF_ID = UO.IF_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TAT.STRIFID, TAT.STRRESID, TAT.INTTIMESTAMP, TS.AI_ACCURACY FROM RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_TRAFFIC TAT INNER JOIN NIA.TB_SOP TS ON TAT.TICKET_ID = TS.TICKET_ID ) AI ON AI.STRIFID = P.STRIFID AND AI.STRRESID = P.STRRESID AND AI.INTTIMESTAMP = P.INTTIMESTAMP WHERE INSERT_TIME >= (#{startTime}::TIMESTAMP - '1 day'::interval) AND TO_TIMESTAMP(P.INTTIMESTAMP) BETWEEN #{startTime}::TIMESTAMP AND #{endTime}::TIMESTAMP
SELECT #{eventno}, STRRESNM, STRIPADDR , STRIFNAME, STRIFDESC, STRIFSPEED, STRIFTYPE, STRIFOPERSTATUS , NREN_ID, NREN_NAME, NODE_ID, IF_ID , T.STRIFID, T.STRRESID, STRTYPEMIN, INTTIMESTAMP, INTYEAR , INTMONTH, INTDAY, INTHOUR , INTMIN, INTWEEK , INTBANDWIDTH, FLTBPSIN, FLTBPSOUT, FLTPPSIN, FLTPPSOUT , INTBANDWIDTH, FLTBPSIN, FLTBPSOUT, FLTPPSIN, FLTPPSOUT , FLTERRORIN, FLTERROROUT, FLTDISCARDIN, FLTDISCARDOUT, FLTUNKNOWN , FLTUSAGE, FLHCINOCTETS, FLHCOUTOCTETS, FLHCINUCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, FLTBPSINMAX , FLTBPSOUTMAX, FLTPPSINMAX, FLTPPSOUTMAX, FLTERRORINMAX, FLTERROROUTMAX , FLTDISCARDINMAX, FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, FLTUNKNOWNMAX, FLTUSAGEMAX, AI.AI_ACCURACY FROM ( SELECT NM.NODE_NM AS STRRESNM, NULL AS STRIPADDR , PM.IF_NM AS STRIFNAME, PM.IF_DESC AS STRIFDESC, PM.IF_SPEED AS STRIFSPEED, PM.IF_TYPE AS STRIFTYPE, PM.IF_OPER_STATUS AS STRIFOPERSTATUS , UO.NREN_ID, UO.NREN_NAME, UO.NODE_ID, UO.IF_ID , PM.IF_NUM AS STRIFID, PM.NODE_NUM AS STRRESID, '1' AS STRTYPEMIN, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)-32400 AS INTTIMESTAMP, DATE_PART('YEAR'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTYEAR , DATE_PART('MONTH'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTMONTH, DATE_PART('DAY'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTDAY, DATE_PART('HOUR'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTHOUR , DATE_PART('MINUTE'::TEXT, LT.MEASURED_DATETIME)::INTEGER AS INTMIN, EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM LT.MEASURED_DATETIME) AS INTWEEK , NULL AS INTBANDWIDTH, LT.RX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSIN, LT.TX_BIT_RATE AS FLTBPSOUT, LT.RX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSIN, LT.TX_PKT_RATE AS FLTPPSOUT , NULL AS FLTERRORIN, NULL AS FLTERROROUT, NULL AS FLTDISCARDIN, NULL AS FLTDISCARDOUT, NULL AS FLTUNKNOWN , NULL AS FLTUSAGE, NULL AS FLHCINOCTETS, NULL AS FLHCOUTOCTETS, NULL AS FLHCINUCASTPKTS, NULL AS FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , NULL AS FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, NULL AS FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, NULL AS FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, NULL AS FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, NULL AS FLTBPSINMAX , NULL AS FLTBPSOUTMAX, NULL AS FLTPPSINMAX, NULL AS FLTPPSOUTMAX, NULL AS FLTERRORINMAX, NULL AS FLTERROROUTMAX , NULL AS FLTDISCARDINMAX, NULL AS FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, NULL AS FLTUNKNOWNMAX, NULL AS FLTUSAGEMAX , LT.MEASURED_DATETIME FROM IP_SDN.TB_LINK_TRAFFIC LT INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_INTERFACE I ON LT.IF_ID = I.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM ON PM.IF_ID = LOWER(I.IF_NAME) INNER JOIN IP_SDN.TB_NODE N ON I.NODE_ID = N.ID INNER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST NM ON N.ID = NM.IP_SDN_ID::INT LEFT OUTER JOIN RESOURCE.TB_USER_ORGAN UO ON UO.NODE_ID = NM.NODE_ID AND UO.IF_ID = PM.IF_ID WHERE LT.MEASURED_DATETIME BETWEEN #{startTime}::TIMESTAMP AND #{endTime}::TIMESTAMP ) T LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A1T.STRIFID, A1T.STRRESID, A1T.MEASURED_DATETIME, TS.AI_ACCURACY FROM RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_1MI_TRAFFIC A1T INNER JOIN NIA.TB_SOP TS ON A1T.TICKET_ID = TS.TICKET_ID

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_XE_SFLOW_LOG ( EVENTNO, STRRESIP, STRRESNAME, STRS_IP, STRS_PORT, STRD_IP, STRD_PORT, STRS_MAC, STRD_MAC, STRPROTOCOL, STRIPV4TOS, STRCHANNEL, STRSENDERIP, STRIN_INTERFACE, STROUT_INTERFACE, STRBYTES_COL, STRCOUNTS, DATEREGDATE, AI_ACCURACY ) SELECT #{eventno}, XSL.STRRESIP, XSL.STRRESNAME, XSL.STRS_IP, XSL.STRS_PORT, XSL.STRD_IP , XSL.STRD_PORT, XSL.STRS_MAC, XSL.STRD_MAC, XSL.STRPROTOCOL, XSL.STRIPV4TOS , XSL.STRCHANNEL, XSL.STRSENDERIP, XSL.STRIN_INTERFACE, XSL.STROUT_INTERFACE, XSL.STRBYTES_COL , XSL.STRCOUNTS, XSL.DATEREGDATE, AI.AI_ACCURACY FROM IP_YD.XE_SFLOW_LOG XSL LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT TNT.STRRESIP, TNT.STRS_IP, TNT.STRS_PORT, TNT.STRD_IP, TNT.STRD_PORT, TNT.DATEREGDATE, TS.AI_ACCURACY FROM RCA.TB_NOXIOUS_TRAFFIC TNT INNER JOIN NIA.TB_SOP TS ON TNT.TICKET_ID = TS.TICKET_ID ) AI ON AI.STRRESIP = XSL.STRRESIP AND AI.STRS_IP = XSL.STRS_IP AND AI.STRS_PORT = XSL.STRS_PORT AND AI.STRD_IP = XSL.STRD_IP AND AI.STRD_PORT = XSL.STRD_PORT AND AI.DATEREGDATE = XSL.DATEREGDATE WHERE XSL.DATEREGDATE BETWEEN #{startTime}::TIMESTAMP AND #{endTime}::TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE ( EVENTNO, INTRESIDX, MODULE_SRL, MEMBER_SRL, STRRESNAME, STRRESID, STRRESTYPE, STRMODELID, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1, STRGROUPID2, STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6, STRGROUPID7, STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, STRTAGS, STRPRIORITY, STRRESMEMO, STRCOLID, STRIPVER, STRIPADDR, STRIPV6ADDR, STRSNMPIPADDR, STRSNMPVER, STRSNMPCOMMUNITY, INTSNMPPORT, INTSNMPTIMEOUT, STRSNMPV3_USERNAME, STRSNMPV3_SECURITYLEVEL, STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPROTOCOL, STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPASSWORD, STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPROTOCOL, STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPASSWORD, STRSNMPV3_CONTEXTNAME, STRENABLED_CPU, STRENABLED_MEM, STRENABLED_DISK, STRSNMPMIB_CPU, STRSNMPMIB_MEM, STRSNMPMIB_DISK, STREVENT_CPU, STREVENT_MEM, STREVENT_DISK, STRSTATUSSNMP, STRENABLEDSNMP, DATEUPTIME, STRSTATUSPING, INTINTERVALPING, INTTIMEOUTPING, STRENABLEDPING, INTLOGRAISECOUNT, INTERRRAISECOUNT, STRCPUCURRENT, STRMEMCURRENT, STRDISKCURRENT, STRRTTCURRENT, INTSENSORPID, STRALIVE, STRCONTACTS, DATEPROBEUPDATEDATE, DATELASTUPDATEDATE, DATEREGDATE ) SELECT #{eventno}, INTRESIDX, MODULE_SRL, MEMBER_SRL, STRRESNAME, STRRESID , STRRESTYPE, STRMODELID, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1, STRGROUPID2 , STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6, STRGROUPID7 , STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, STRTAGS, STRPRIORITY , STRRESMEMO, STRCOLID, STRIPVER, STRIPADDR, STRIPV6ADDR , STRSNMPIPADDR, STRSNMPVER, STRSNMPCOMMUNITY, INTSNMPPORT, INTSNMPTIMEOUT , STRSNMPV3_USERNAME, STRSNMPV3_SECURITYLEVEL, STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPROTOCOL, STRSNMPV3_AUTHENTICATIONPASSWORD, STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPROTOCOL , STRSNMPV3_PRIVACYPASSWORD, STRSNMPV3_CONTEXTNAME, STRENABLED_CPU, STRENABLED_MEM, STRENABLED_DISK , STRSNMPMIB_CPU, STRSNMPMIB_MEM, STRSNMPMIB_DISK, STREVENT_CPU, STREVENT_MEM , STREVENT_DISK, STRSTATUSSNMP, STRENABLEDSNMP, DATEUPTIME, STRSTATUSPING , INTINTERVALPING, INTTIMEOUTPING, STRENABLEDPING, INTLOGRAISECOUNT, INTERRRAISECOUNT , STRCPUCURRENT, STRMEMCURRENT, STRDISKCURRENT, STRRTTCURRENT, INTSENSORPID , STRALIVE, STRCONTACTS, DATEPROBEUPDATEDATE, DATELASTUPDATEDATE, DATEREGDATE FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_FAULT_EVENT_XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF ( EVENTNO, INTIFIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRIFNAME, STRRESID_A, STRRESID_Z, INTIFINDEX, STRIFDESC, STRIFTYPE, STRIFSPEED, STRIFPHYSADDRESS, STRIFOPERSTATUS, STRIFLIMITBPS, STRIFLIMITBPSC, STRIFLIMITBPSM, STRIFLIMITBPSN, STRIFLIMITBPSW, STRIFERRLEVEL, STRIFIPADDR, STRIFMANPERF, STRIFMANERROR, STRIFCURRENT, STRIFLIMITERR, STRIFMEMO, DATELASTUPDATEDATE, DATEREGDATE ) SELECT #{eventno}, INTIFIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRIFNAME , STRRESID_A, STRRESID_Z, INTIFINDEX, STRIFDESC, STRIFTYPE , STRIFSPEED, STRIFPHYSADDRESS, STRIFOPERSTATUS, STRIFLIMITBPS, STRIFLIMITBPSC , STRIFLIMITBPSM, STRIFLIMITBPSN, STRIFLIMITBPSW, STRIFERRLEVEL, STRIFIPADDR , STRIFMANPERF, STRIFMANERROR, STRIFCURRENT, STRIFLIMITERR, STRIFMEMO , DATELASTUPDATEDATE, DATEREGDATE FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_RESOURCE_IF
